sentences.english: I noticed an incorrect charge on my latest invoice.
Can you tell me which charge you're referring to?
There's a charge of four hundred and ninety-nine dollars for a premium subscription that I never signed up for.
sentences.korean: 가입한 적 없는 프리미엄 구독에 대해 499달러가 청구되어 있어요.

sentences.english: Let me pull up your account.
I can see the charge here and it does look like a system error on our end.
sentences.korean: 청구가 보이는데 저희 쪽 시스템 오류인 것 같아요.

sentences.english: How long will the refund take?
It will be processed within three to five business days and I'm adding a ten percent discount on your next invoice as well.
sentences.korean: 영업일 기준 3~5일 내 처리되고 다음 청구서에 10% 할인도 적용해드리겠습니다.

quiz.question: What does '시스템 오류' mean in English?
